## Meeting Purpose

[Reconnect and explore potential collaboration between Gregory Croteau (Viant Inc.) and Marcel Santilli (FWD Digital) for content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company, FWD Digital, offers efficient, AI-assisted content creation services, producing high-volume, quality content at 10 cents per word](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [FWD Digital's process includes rapid research, strategy alignment, and content production, typically publishing within 3 weeks of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Gregory's current content efforts (5 blogs/month) yield limited results, suggesting potential for improvement through FWD Digital's services](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Next steps include reviewing a proposal from Marcel and potentially scheduling a kickoff for February 3rd, pending internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

## Topics

### Personal Updates and Reconnection

  - [Gregory: Moved to New York, has two children (5 and 2 years old)](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Marcel: Has a 20-month-old child after IVF journey](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Both reflected positively on their past work experiences together](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

### Marcel's Current Business Success

  - [FWD Digital has 17 employees](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Approaching $4 million in ARR with profitability](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Working with notable clients like Reddit, Bramp, and Agent](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Passionate about content marketing and building technology](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

### Content Marketing Approach by FWD Digital

  - [Rapid 12-week process: company research, kickoff, strategy alignment, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Uses AI and human editors to create high-volume, quality content efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Creates thousands of content assignments based on keyword research and competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Focuses on "planting seeds" with initial content, then improving over time](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Produces 30-50 pieces of content per month, including refreshing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### Content Distribution and Conversion Strategy

  - [Emphasizes the importance of brands as publishers and leaders as influencers](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Advocates for building authority through consistent, high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Suggests starting with reliable content production before launching newsletters or other distribution channels](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)

### Newsletter Strategy

  - [Launched successful AI-focused newsletter at DeepGram (aimines.com), growing to 300,000 subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Recommends establishing consistent content production before launching a newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Suggests creating irresistible offers to build subscriber base](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Gregory's Current Content Marketing Situation

  - [Publishing 5 blogs per month with a freelancer and full-time content writer](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [November results: 3,800 users, 14 MQLs, 3 SQLs, 1 conversion](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Current efforts seem inefficient compared to potential results with FWD Digital's approach](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send a proposal and pricing details to Gregory](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Gregory to discuss internally with his team, particularly with Gizale](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting after CES (week of January 8th)](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Consider February 3rd as a possible kickoff date if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/uGnWu-4cgd_Wzy9DAoMMQ_pZca6QrGfo?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
